vocab.meaning: sự tập trung toàn tâm toàn ý
vocab.example: Studying in solitude allows me to give my undivided attention to complex theories without being interrupted by idle chatter.

vocab.meaning: việc học tập mang tính cộng tác
vocab.example: I value collaborative learning because it exposes me to diverse perspectives that I might have overlooked on my own.

vocab.meaning: một cách dẫn đến sự xao nhãng (công thức gây mất tập trung)
vocab.example: For me, heading to a café with friends is often a recipe for distraction rather than a productive study session.
I tend to absorb information much more effectively when I can process it at my own idiosyncratic pace.

vocab.meaning: trách nhiệm giải trình với bạn bè (giúp nhau cùng tiến bộ)
vocab.example: The main advantage of a study group is the sense of peer accountability, which prevents me from procrastinating.
Group discussions can sometimes lead to cognitive overload when too many conflicting ideas are presented at once.

vocab.meaning: làm việc theo từng đợt ngắn (tập trung cao độ trong thời gian ngắn)
vocab.example: Studying alone gives me the flexibility to work in bursts and take breaks whenever I feel my energy flagging.

vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy sự cạnh tranh lành mạnh
vocab.example: I enjoy studying with classmates because it can foster healthy competition and push us all to achieve higher grades.

vocab.meaning: sự tự chủ trong việc học
vocab.example: I cherish the autonomy in learning that comes with solo sessions, as I can focus purely on my own weak points.
When everyone in a group is well-prepared, there is a synergistic effect that elevates our collective understanding of the subject.
